२०२१ मध्ये नोंदवलेल्या सर्व एलोपॅथिक आउटपेशंट भेटींच्या एकूण संख्येनुसार उपजिल्हे आणि त्यांच्या क्षेत्र प्रकारांची श्रेणी लावा, सर्वोच्च उपस्थितीपासून सुरुवात करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(fos.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC) as RANK,
    ds.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA,
    SUM(fos.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) as TOTAL_ATTENDANCE
FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES fos
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT ds ON fos.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = ds.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_MONTH dm ON fos.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
WHERE dy.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
GROUP BY ds.SUB_DISTRICT_ID, ds.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, ds.TYPE_OF_AREA
ORDER BY TOTAL_ATTENDANCE DESC;

    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(fos.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC) as RANK,

    sd.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,

question: २०२१ मध्ये ग्रामीण भागात हिमोग्लोबिन ११ पेक्षा कमी असलेल्या गर्भवती महिलांचे प्रकरण नोंदवलेले असलेले उप-जिल्हे कोणते आहेत, परंतु शहरी भागात असे कोणतेही प्रकरण नव्हते?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sd.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
FROM FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mht
JOIN DIM_MONTH m ON mht.MONTH_ID = m.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON m.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON mht.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE y.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
  AND sd.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'
  AND mht.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mht_urban
    JOIN DIM_MONTH m_urban ON mht_urban.MONTH_ID = m_urban.MONTH_ID
    JOIN DIM_YEAR y_urban ON m_urban.YEAR_ID = y_urban.YEAR_ID
    JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd_urban ON mht_urban.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = sd_urban.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
    WHERE y_urban.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
      AND sd_urban.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
      AND sd_urban.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban'
      AND mht_urban.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0
  );
